title: I Need Dragon Egg
description: Makes the Ender Dragon drop extra eggs on non‑first kills with a decreasing chance.
body:
**I Need Dragon Egg** is a small yet interesting mod that makes the Ender Dragon drop its egg again! 

After the first kill, each subsequent defeat has a chance to drop a Dragon Egg. The drop rate starts at **70%** and gradually decreases with each kill, down to a minimum of **20%**, adding a fun and rewarding challenge for endgame players. 

Whether you want to collect multiple eggs, decorate your base, or share with friends, this mod gives you a reason to fight the dragon again and again.
